name: 2026.13.9 (Plus 9)
body:
## SourceGit Plus v2026.13.9 (Plus 9)

**Fixes**
* Caption buttons now execute on mouse release even when clicked at the very top edge of a maximized Windows window.
* Windows window decorations now keep native minimize/restore animations available.

Download: https://github.com/kkkyloo/sourcegit_plus/releases/latest

---
Upstream: https://github.com/sourcegit-scm/sourcegit/releases/tag/v2026.13
